meta.question: Which organizations have models about university admissions?
meta.finalAnswer: The organization "Org31" has a model related to student processes titled "izdavanje kartice student, DOMACI". No other models specifically matching "university admissions" were found in the corpus.

request.query:
prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?org ?orgName ?modelName WHERE {
  ?model a bboExt:Model .
  ?model bbo:name ?modelName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?modelName), "admission") || CONTAINS(LCASE(?modelName), "university"))
  ?model tai:belongsTo ?org .
  ?org rdfs:label ?orgName .
}
LIMIT 25

request.reason: The initial query for "admission" or "university" in model names returned no results. I will now broaden the search to look for any models that might be related to "university" or "admission" by searching through all model names and then checking their associated organizations.

request.query:
prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?modelName ?orgName WHERE {
  ?model a bboExt:Model .
  ?model bbo:name ?modelName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?modelName), "univers"))
  ?model tai:belongsTo ?org .
  OPTIONAL { ?org rdfs:label ?orgName . }
}
LIMIT 50

request.reason: Searching for "univers" in model names yielded no results. I will now search for "admission" or "student" or "enrollment" to see if any models related to university processes exist under different names.

request.query:
prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?modelName ?orgName WHERE {
  ?model a bboExt:Model .
  ?model bbo:name ?modelName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?modelName), "admission") || CONTAINS(LCASE(?modelName), "student") || CONTAINS(LCASE(?modelName), "enroll"))
  ?model tai:belongsTo ?org .
  OPTIONAL { ?org rdfs:label ?orgName . }
}
LIMIT 50

request.reason: Found one model related to student processes ("izdavanje kartice student, DOMACI") belonging to Org31. This is the only relevant result found after broadening the search terms.

request.answer: The organization "Org31" has a model related to student processes titled "izdavanje kartice student, DOMACI". No other models specifically matching "university admissions" were found in the corpus.

events.finalAnswer: The organization "Org31" has a model related to student processes titled "izdavanje kartice student, DOMACI". No other models specifically matching "university admissions" were found in the corpus.
